auth.subtitle: Obubaka obukyayuwa bwa P2P

auth.confirmRemoveAccount: Ggyawo akawunti ku lukalala? Akawunti yennyini tegenda kusazibwamu.
auth.securityQuestionsNotConfigured: Ebibuuzo by'ebyokwerinda tebitegekeddwa ku akawunti eno
auth.seedPhraseWarning: Ebigambo bino 24 bitereke! Zilagibwa OMULUNDI GMU gwokka.
auth.seedPhraseHint: Bw’oba ​​weerabira password yo, ekigambo kino y’engeri yokka gy’oyinza okuzzaawo akawunti yo. Write it down on paper and keep it in a safe place.
auth.linkDeviceDesc: Yingiza koodi eno ku kyuma ekipya

hidden.setPassword: Teeka ekigambo ekyama ku mboozi ezikwekeddwa

settings.fileTooLarge: Fairo nene nnyo. Obungi obusingawo 2 MB.
settings.geoFailed: Yeekubye okunnonya kifo. Kebera nga GPS/Wi-Fi etekedde.
settings.geoTimeout: Biseera byo okunonya kifo bivuddeko. Gezaako mu kifo ekizibulide.
settings.speaker: Sipiika
settings.ttlPrompt: Oluvannyuma lw’ennaku mmeka nga tokola akawunti erina okusazibwamu?
settings.sqQuestion1: Ekisolo kyo ekyasooka kyali kiyitibwa ki?
settings.sqQuestion3: Firimu ki gye wali osinga okwagala mu buto?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Bw’oba ​​weerabira password yo, osobola okuddamu okuyingira ng’oddamu ebibuuzo 3. Osobola okukozesa ebibuuzo byo oba ebyo ebisookerwako.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Okukebera buli mwezi — kakasa nti ojjukira password yo ey’okuyingira.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Tukuwa amagezi okulongoosa ekigambo kyo eky'okuyingira ng'oyingidde, oleme kufiirwa kuyingira.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Clear media cache ne data ey'ekiseera?

Ebisumuluzo by'okusiba n'ensengeka TEBIJJA kusazibwamu.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Session erina okuba nga ekola okumala waakiri ennaku 7 okukyusa password.

Obudde obusigaddeyo: {daysLeft} ennaku.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Ennaku 7 tezinnaba kuyitawo. Nsaba mulinde {daysLeft} ennaku endala.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Okuyingira mu geolocation kugaaniddwa.

1. macOS: Ensengeka z’enkola → Eby’ekyama → Empeereza y’ekifo → sobozesa ku bulawuzi
2. Browser: nyweza akabonero k’okusiba mu bbaala y’endagiriro → Ekifo → Kiriza
3. Ddamu okutikka omuko
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Okuyingira mu geolocation kugaaniddwa.

Nywa ku kabonero k’okusiba mu bbaala y’endagiriro → Ekifo → Kiriza, olwo oddemu okutikka olupapula

panic.callSettingsNote: Teeka mu nsi: Enkola za Force TCP ne Relay zinayinza okwongeza olubeere naye ziwa obwereere obungi. Okukuba ensimbi ku traffic kwongera okujjuza mu kyamatterero kya SDP.
panic.desc: Ebiri byonna mu node eno binaggibwako butereevu. Ekolwa eno tegenda kukyusibwa.
panic.warningBody:
Ogenda okusaanyaawo data zonna enkalakkalira.
Ekikolwa kino tekiyinza kuddibwamu.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Ebiwandiiko byonna biggiddwawo. Olutuula luno luwedde.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Omuzi omupya gw'ekifo nagulondebwa — tuma gy'emu ku byuma byonna byawe (E2E byagaliddwa)
privacy.backupHint: Gala emiryango gyonna n'ekigambo n'oteeka ku seeva. N'okukyusa ekyuma — ddamu n'ekigambo ekimu.
privacy.crossSignHint: Kakasa ebyuma bipya gy'emu obukoole bwa HMAC (okukuuma okukwatibwako)
privacy.federatedHint: Gabana okugabana ekyuma kyagaliddwa ku nodes za federation. Neewaawo seeva yabula — ddamu ne bannange.
privacy.historySyncHint: Okoppa kw'obubaka obwagaliddwa kulabika ku byuma byonna. Seeva elaba kasisi kwokka
privacy.ktHint: Log ey'okwongerako yokka gy'opyolerwa yonna yo okukyuka kw'emiryango gya gavumenti n'omukutu gwa hash (Merkle). Seeva esetera buli kyeyandiikirwaako — obulimba bulaabika mu okulowooza.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Viirisa emiryango ku kyuma kipya obukoole bw'ennamba 6. Emiryango gyagaliddwa ne ECIES — seeva tegenda kubasoma.
privacy.ssssHint: Sasula omuzi omukulu mu bitundu N. Bitundu ebiri N binaadda omuzi. Ekitundu kyonna kyagaliddwa eri omulanzi owaakiri oyo (ECIES). Seeva elaba blobs ezagaliddwa yokka.
privacy.title: Obwereere

settings_profile.profileIconOver: Ekizina kirekulira waggulu w'emabega ya profile

contactSync.noMatches: Tewali muntu yenna azuuliddwa ku Vortex n'okutuusa kati

keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Yingiza koodi eno ku kyuma kyo ekikulu
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Ekitono ennyo 2 ezesigika contacts ne threshold ≥ 2
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Yingiza ekigambo ky'okuyita okusobola okusiba. Kijjukire — okudda engulu awatali ekyo tekisoboka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Yingiza ekigambo ky'okuyita kye wakozesa ng'okola backup.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Okusazaamu ebisumuluzo backup? Ekikolwa kino tekikyuka.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Okusazaamu emigabo gyonna emikulu? Okuddamu okukola nga oyita mu bantu abeesigika kijja kufuuka ekitasoboka.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Ekisumuluzo kyo ekikulu kijja kwawulwamu emigabo N nga okozesa enteekateeka ya Shamir. Emigabo gya M gyonna gijja kukkiriza okuzzaawo ebisumuluzo. Buli mugabo gukuumibwa ensirifu olw'omuntu eyesigika eyeesigika.
keyBackup.thresholdRange: Threshold erina okuva ku 2 okutuuka ku {max}.
keyBackup.noContactsWithKeys: Tewali kukwatagana na bisumuluzo bya lukale
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Waakiri bannaabwe 2 abakola nga balina encryption yeetaagibwa
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Okusazaamu backup eya federo? Shards ku peers zijja kusigala, naye metadata ejja kubula.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
